_about: Per-agent SKILL.md frontmatter support matrix. Sources cited inline. Update when an agent's spec changes. Side-files (agents/openai.yaml, etc.) are tracked under sideFiles, not frontmatter.

claude._source: Claude Code skills docs + skills.sh spec

codex._source: agentskills.io spec — Codex CLI reads name/description + markdown body; agent-specific metadata via agents/openai.yaml

antigravity._source: no documented spec; conservatively assume the universal minimum
